name: PAR TECHNOLOGY CORP/DEL
summary: PAR TECHNOLOGY CORP/DEL is a global provider of point-of-sale (POS) solutions, including software, hardware, and services, to the restaurant and retail industries. Headquartered in New Hartford, New York, the company operates through its Brink POS and Punchh subsidiaries, offering solutions to streamline operations, enhance customer engagement, and improve profitability for its clients. Par also provides government and defense solutions.
